ham.subject: Your SaaS Subscription Renewal Notice – Action Required
ham.body:
Dear [Name],

We hope you are enjoying the enhanced features of our SaaS platform. This email is to inform you that your subscription will automatically renew on 15th May 2026. Your current plan (Pro) will be billed at INR 3,500 per month.

If you wish to change your plan, upgrade, or cancel, please click <URL> within the next 48 hours to update your account details. Otherwise, the renewal will proceed as scheduled and your access will continue uninterrupted.

Thank you for choosing our services. If you have any questions, feel free to reach out.

Best regards,
[Company] Support Team

spam.subject: Urgent: Scholarship Award Confirmation – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Student,

We are pleased to inform you that you have been selected for the prestigious XYZ University Merit Scholarship 2026. Congratulations! As per university regulations, we require the confirmation of your receipt by submitting a small processing fee of INR 2,000. Please click <URL> to submit your details and payment within 24 hours. Failure to comply will result in cancellation of your scholarship.

The scholarship is offered by the Dean of the Faculty of Sciences. Please provide your student ID, date of birth, and bank account details to complete the process.

We appreciate your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
Dr. A. Sharma
Dean, XYZ University
